title: The Bull Case for Oil Prices (5 Catalysts)
text: Oil has oscillated back and forth in recent months. However, 5 long-term catalysts suggest that it's too early to give up on the sector.

title: EQT Announces Pricing of Tender Offer for 6.125% Senior Notes due 2025
text: PITTSBURGH , June 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) ("EQT") today announced the consideration payable with respect to its previously announced tender offer (the "Tender Offer") to purchase for cash up to $300.0 million aggregate principal amount (the "Maximum Tender Amount") of its outstanding 6.125% Senior Notes due 2025 (the "Notes"). The following table sets forth some of the terms of the Tender Offer, including the consideration payable: Title of Notes CUSIP Number Principal Amount Outstanding Maximum Tender Amount Reference U.S. Treasury Security Reference U.S. Treasury Yield Fixed Spread Early Tender Premium(1) Early Tender Consideration(1)(2) Approximate Proration Factor(3) 6.125% Senior Notes due 2025 26884LAH2 $901,521,000 $300,000,000 1.375% U.S. Treasury Notes due January 31, 2025 4.747 % +115 bps $30.00 $1,003.32 44.7 % (1) Per $1,000 principal amount of Notes accepted for purchase.

title: EQT Announces Early Results and Upsizing of its Tender Offer for 6.125% Senior Notes due 2025
text: PITTSBURGH , June 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) ("EQT") today announced the early results and upsizing of its previously announced tender offer (the "Tender Offer") to purchase for cash up to an amended Maximum Tender Amount (as defined below) of its outstanding 6.125% Senior Notes due 2025 (the "Notes"). EQT has amended the Tender Offer to increase the aggregate principal amount of Notes subject to the Tender Offer (the "Maximum Tender Amount") from $250.0 million to $300.0 million.
